no_changes_rationale:
All acceptance criteria already satisfied at base-rev e82a9bc6.

This bead (ddx-7e9cc0cc) duplicates ddx-1bbd1096 ("B14.2: cli/internal/federation
package - state types + persistence + schema_version"), which was closed and
landed in commit 0dd3cead "feat(federation): add internal/federation state
types + persistence [ddx-1bbd1096]" — an ancestor of base-rev.

AC1 — internal/federation/ package with state types: SATISFIED.
  cli/internal/federation/state.go defines:
    - FederationRegistry { SchemaVersion, Spokes }
    - SpokeRecord { NodeID, Name, URL, DDxVersion, SchemaVersion, Capabilities,
      RegisteredAt, LastHeartbeat, Status } — keyed by stable NodeID
    - SpokeStatus enum: registered/active/stale/offline/degraded (+ Valid())
    - NewRegistry, FindSpoke, UpsertSpoke (NodeID-keyed insert/replace),
      RemoveSpoke, SetStatus, ReconcileLiveness
  Heartbeat data lives on SpokeRecord.LastHeartbeat (time.Time); registration
  version on SpokeRecord.SchemaVersion / DDxVersion plus the registry-level
  CurrentSchemaVersion constant. The bead's named types (Spoke, Heartbeat,
  RegistrationVersion) map onto these existing fields; no new wrapper types
  are needed and adding them would diverge from the call sites already wired
  in fanout.go, spoke.go, handshake.go.

AC2 — persistence layer with atomic writes: SATISFIED.
  cli/internal/federation/persistence.go:
    - DefaultStatePath honors XDG_DATA_HOME, default ~/.local/share/ddx/
      federation-state.json (the "or similar" path slot in the bead).
    - SaveStateTo: marshal -> tmpfile in target dir -> fsync -> chmod 0600 ->
      atomic rename. writeMu serializes intra-process writers.
    - LoadStateFrom: missing-file -> fresh registry; malformed JSON ->
      quarantine to "<path>.corrupt-<ts>" and return fresh registry;
      pre-versioned files default to CurrentSchemaVersion.

AC3 — tests: SATISFIED.
  cli/internal/federation/state_test.go (313 lines) covers round-trip,
  missing-file, malformed-file recovery, status transitions, NodeID upsert
  semantics. `go test ./internal/federation/` passes (verified at this rev).

No code changes were necessary or appropriate; implementing again would
duplicate or churn working, integrated code that downstream beads
(ddx-ab7f6184, ddx-238880c4, ddx-89bc2db4) already depend on.

verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/federation/
